name: Spec / Contract Guardian Specialist
description: Checks for evidence-backed drift between project specs, docs/manifest.json, test scenarios, API contracts, pure-logic/view/data boundaries, and implementation code.

skills.name: Spec and Contract Drift Review
skills.description: Compares manifests, component specs, test scenarios, API contracts, pure-logic/view/data boundaries, and code to find evidence-backed drift and block code-only SDD changes.
examples: Compare docs/manifest.json and component specs to the implemented modules and exported APIs.
Check whether a pure-logic module now depends on runtime, storage, network, or UI code.
Block a behavior or UX code change when docs/test-scenarios.md or the component spec was not updated.
Review route handlers, generated types, and API docs for contract drift.
